title: ProjectZ Modpack
description: The modpack of the ProjectZ server, a Zombie apocalypse themed world
body:
# ProjectZ - Will You Survive the Apocalypse?

ProjectZ immerses you in a world ravaged by catastrophe, where zombies lurk at every corner and survival is an everyday battle. Managing your health, resources, and security will be essential if you hope to see another day. This modpack combines realistic survival, intense combat, and advanced protection for an immersive and unforgiving experience.
## Key Mods
Tough As Nails: Adds an advanced system for managing thirst and body temperature, forcing players to stay hydrated and protect themselves from extreme weather conditions.

**Marbled’s Arsenal:** Introduces a variety of military-grade armor designed to provide enhanced protection and better resistance to damage.

**SecurityCraft:** Allows you to install cameras, traps, reinforced doors, and other devices to strengthen the defense of your base.

**Timeless And Classic:** Adds a wide range of firearms inspired by various eras, from classic revolvers to modern rifles.

**First Aid:** Replaces the traditional health system with a detailed injury management system, requiring specific care for each body part.

### The dead have taken over the world. Will you survive in ProjectZ?
